# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - prepare
  - build
  - test
  - deploy

workflow:
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH
    - when: never

variables:
  GIT_DEPTH: "0"

default:
  image: alpine:3.20

prepare_metadata:
  stage: prepare
  script:
    - apk add --no-cache curl jq git
    - |
      if [ -n "${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID:-}" ]; then
        MR_API="${CI_API_V4_URL}/projects/${CI_PROJECT_ID}/merge_requests/${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}"
        MR_JSON="$(curl --silent --header "JOB-TOKEN: ${CI_JOB_TOKEN}" "$MR_API")"
        MR_TITLE="$(echo "$MR_JSON" | jq -r '.title // empty')"
        MR_DESCRIPTION="$(echo "$MR_JSON" | jq -r '.description // empty' | tr '\n' ' ' | sed 's/[[:space:]]\+/ /g; s/^ //; s/ $//')"
      else
        MR_TITLE="${CI_COMMIT_TITLE:-}"
        MR_DESCRIPTION="${CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE:-}"
      fi

      SAFE_TITLE="$(printf '%s' "$MR_TITLE" | tr '\n' ' ' | sed 's/[[:space:]]\+/ /g; s/^ //; s/ $//')"
      SAFE_DESC="$(printf '%s' "$MR_DESCRIPTION" | tr '\n' ' ' | sed 's/[[:space:]]\+/ /g; s/^ //; s/ $//')"
      COMMIT_SUBJECT="${SAFE_TITLE:-${CI_COMMIT_TITLE:-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}}}"
      RELEASE_NOTES="$(printf '%s\n\n%s' "$SAFE_TITLE" "$SAFE_DESC" | sed '/^$/d')"

      printf 'MR_TITLE=%s\n' "$(printf '%s' "$SAFE_TITLE" | sed "s/'/'\\\\''/g")" > build.env
      printf 'MR_DESCRIPTION=%s\n' "$(printf '%s' "$SAFE_DESC" | sed "s/'/'\\\\''/g")" >> build.env
      printf 'COMMIT_SUBJECT=%s\n' "$(printf '%s' "$COMMIT_SUBJECT" | sed "s/'/'\\\\''/g")" >> build.env
      printf 'RELEASE_NOTES=%s\n' "$(printf '%s' "$RELEASE_NOTES" | sed "s/'/'\\\\''/g")" >> build.env
      printf 'DEPLOY_TAG=%s\n' "$(printf '%s' "${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}-${SAFE_TITLE:-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}}" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' | sed 's/[^a-z0-9._-]/-/g; s/-\+/-/g; s/^-//; s/-$//')"
      printf 'DEPLOY_TAG=%s\n' "$(printf '%s' "${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}-${SAFE_TITLE:-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}}" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' | sed 's/[^a-z0-9._-]/-/g; s/-\+/-/g; s/^-//; s/-$//')" >> build.env
  artifacts:
    reports:
      dotenv: build.env
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH

build:
  stage: build
  needs: ["prepare_metadata"]
  script:
    - echo "Building for: ${MR_TITLE:-$CI_COMMIT_TITLE}"
    - echo "Commit message subject: ${COMMIT_SUBJECT}"
    - echo "Release notes:"
    - printf '%s\n' "${RELEASE_NOTES:-${CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE}}"
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH

test:
  stage: test
  needs: ["prepare_metadata"]
  script:
    - echo "Testing feature: ${MR_TITLE:-$CI_COMMIT_TITLE}"
    - echo "MR description: ${MR_DESCRIPTION:-$CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE}"
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  needs: ["prepare_metadata", "build", "test"]
  script:
    - echo "Deploying tag: ${DEPLOY_TAG}"
    - echo "Build notification: Deploying ${MR_TITLE:-$CI_COMMIT_TITLE}"
    - echo "Commit message: ${COMMIT_SUBJECT}"
    - echo "Automatic release notes:"
    - printf '%s\n' "${RELEASE_NOTES:-${CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE}}"
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://example.com
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
  tags:
    - "${DEPLOY_TAG}"
